panels.description: Wide shot: Two silhouettes (the narrator and the curate) creeping through a dark, desolate residential street in Sheen at night, approaching a small semi-detached villa.

bubbles.text: The night was too dark to see into the side roads... In Sheen, my companion complained of faintness. We decided to try a house.

panels.description: Medium shot: The narrator inside a pantry, holding a hatchet, looking at shelves filled with food. A sense of weary relief.

bubbles.text: We found a store of food—bottled beer, beans, lettuce, and burgundy. Little did we know, this was to sustain us for a fortnight.

panels.description: Dramatic high-contrast shot: The interior of the kitchen illuminated by a sudden, blinding flash of vivid green light pouring through the window, casting deep, elongated shadows.
Dynamic action shot: The ceiling collapsing, plaster and masonry showering down on the narrator and curate, who are thrown against kitchen appliances in the chaos.

bubbles.text: A concussion... a crash of masonry... I was thrown against the oven and everything went black.
